'''rozaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spaceless|spaceless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spaceless|spaceless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rozaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozarithi|rozarithi]] || [[word:rozariji|rozariji]] || [[word:rozarishi|rozarishi]] || [[word:rozariki|rozariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozaruthuthu|rozaruthuthu]] || [[word:rozarujuju|rozarujuju]] || [[word:rozarushushu|rozarushushu]] || [[word:rozarukuku|rozarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozaruthu|rozaruthu]] || [[word:rozaruju|rozaruju]] || [[word:rozarushu|rozarushu]] || [[word:rozaruku|rozaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozarufthuf|rozarufthuf]] || [[word:rozarufjuf|rozarufjuf]] || [[word:rozarufshuf|rozarufshuf]] || [[word:rozarufkuf|rozarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozarethe|rozarethe]] || [[word:rozareje|rozareje]] || [[word:rozareshe|rozareshe]] || [[word:rozareke|rozareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozarothotho|rozarothotho]] || [[word:rozarojojo|rozarojojo]] || [[word:rozaroshosho|rozaroshosho]] || [[word:rozarokoko|rozarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozarotho|rozarotho]] || [[word:rozarojo|rozarojo]] || [[word:rozarosho|rozarosho]] || [[word:rozaroko|rozaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozarofthof|rozarofthof]] || [[word:rozarofjof|rozarofjof]] || [[word:rozarofshof|rozarofshof]] || [[word:rozarofkof|rozarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozar챦fth챦f|rozar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fj챦f|rozar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fsh챦f|rozar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fk챦f|rozar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozar챦fth챦fth챦f|rozar챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fj챦fj챦f|rozar챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fsh챦fsh챦f|rozar챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fk챦fk챦f|rozar챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozar챦fth챦f|rozar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fj챦f|rozar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fsh챦f|rozar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fk챦f|rozar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozar챦fth챦f|rozar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fj챦f|rozar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fsh챦f|rozar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rozar챦fk챦f|rozar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rozar챈th챈|rozar챈th챈]] || [[word:rozar챈j챈|rozar챈j챈]] || [[word:rozar챈sh챈|rozar챈sh챈]] || [[word:rozar챈k챈|rozar챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rozarathatha|rozarathatha]] || [[word:rozarajaja|rozarajaja]] || [[word:rozarashasha|rozarashasha]] || [[word:rozarakaka|rozarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rozaratha|rozaratha]] || [[word:rozaraja|rozaraja]] || [[word:rozarasha|rozarasha]] || [[word:rozaraka|rozaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rozarafthaf|rozarafthaf]] || [[word:rozarafjaf|rozarafjaf]] || [[word:rozarafshaf|rozarafshaf]] || [[word:rozarafkaf|rozarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rozarasha|rozarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozarsh챘sha|rozarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozarosha|rozarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozarmusha|rozarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozaryasha|rozaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozarnksh챘sha|gorozarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozarnkrosha|gorozarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozarnkmusha|gorozarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozarnkyasha|gorozarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rozazarasha|rozazarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozazarsh챘sha|rozazarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozazarosha|rozazarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozazarmusha|rozazarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozazaryasha|rozazaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozazarnksh챘sha|gorozazarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozazarnkrosha|gorozazarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozazarnkmusha|gorozazarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozazarnkyasha|gorozazarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rez챈rasha|rez챈rasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rez챈rsh챘sha|rez챈rsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rez챈rosha|rez챈rosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rez챈rmusha|rez챈rmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rez챈ryasha|rez챈ryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorez챈rnksh챘sha|gorez챈rnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorez챈rnkrosha|gorez챈rnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorez챈rnkmusha|gorez챈rnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorez챈rnkyasha|gorez챈rnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rozfarasha|rozfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rozfarsh챘sha|rozfarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rozfarosha|rozfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rozfarmusha|rozfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rozfaryasha|rozfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorozfarnksh챘sha|gorozfarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorozfarnkrosha|gorozfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorozfarnkmusha|gorozfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorozfarnkyasha|gorozfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
